form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a fourth (18.81) in a GR 5 at Dubbo and returns after a 12 weeks break. Looks nicely placed and expected to go well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ended last campaign with a fourth (18.81) in a GR 5 at Dubbo and returns after a 12 weeks break. Looks nicely placed and expected to go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began fairly; Heels checked on the home turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last on April 7 over 340m at Bulli behind Fantasia Queen beaten 7 lengths (19.85) in a Grade 5. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished last on April 7 over 340m at Bulli behind Fantasia Queen beaten 7 lengths (19.85) in a Grade 5. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at his last couple of starts, most recently at Bulli over 340m. Well placed and among the chances here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished seventh at his last couple of starts, most recently at Bulli over 340m. Well placed and among the chances here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in shortly after the start and was checked.
At the start stumbled off the mats.
Shortly after the start came together.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when sixth over 350m at this track. Not keen this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Modest effort last time out when sixth over 350m at this track. Not keen this time.

form.formComment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a eighth over 520m at Wentworth Park. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a eighth over 520m at Wentworth Park. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Fantasia Queen at Bulli last start over 340m (19.51). Right in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when second behind Fantasia Queen at Bulli last start over 340m (19.51). Right in the mix.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh over 350m at this track, beaten 10 lengths (20.49) behind Bandit Lynne in a Grade 5 on March 20. Better off looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished seventh over 350m at this track, beaten 10 lengths (20.49) behind Bandit Lynne in a Grade 5 on March 20. Better off looking to others.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (24.00) when seventh over 400m at Dubbo in a Grade 4/5. Starts from box 8 for the first time here. Can hit the frame with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (24.00) when seventh over 400m at Dubbo in a Grade 4/5. Starts from box 8 for the first time here. Can hit the frame with the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began moderately; At first turn was tightened for room and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th on April 2 over 365m at Nowra behind Angry Friendship beaten 12 lengths (21.79) in a Grade 5. Expected to go very well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 7th on April 2 over 365m at Nowra behind Angry Friendship beaten 12 lengths (21.79) in a Grade 5. Expected to go very well.
